name: Hengtong Logistics Co., Ltd.
summary: Hengtong Logistics Co., Ltd. engages in the logistics business in China. The company is involved in the LNG and LPG logistics transportation and sales, gas station construction and operation, gasification peaking station construction and operation, gas pipeline investment operation, distributed energy development and operation, and gas industry personnel technical training businesses. It also engages in road transportation, port warehousing, shipping agency, large equipment hoisting, car rental, vehicle sales and maintenance, driving skills training, qualification training business, and agricultural machinery sales and service. In addition, the company focuses on smart logistics research and development and big data application. The company was formerly known as Longkou Hengtong Transportation Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Hengtong Logistics Co., Ltd. in December 2011. Hengtong Logistics Co., Ltd. was founded in 2007 and is based in Yantai, China.
